creator: s_bugzilla@nedprod.com
text:
Note that NetBSD recently gained a brand new kernel driver for the following Intel Wifi chipsets:

* 7260
* 3160
* 7265

Its man page is here:

http://netbsd.gw.com/cgi-bin/man-cgi?iwm+4+NetBSD-current

Its source code is here:

https://github.com/jsonn/src/blob/a36ed4489eb51ed93b5bc8930d530831103f2f58/sys/dev/pci/if_iwmreg.h
https://github.com/jsonn/src/blob/a36ed4489eb51ed93b5bc8930d530831103f2f58/sys/dev/pci/if_iwmvar.h
https://github.com/jsonn/src/blob/a36ed4489eb51ed93b5bc8930d530831103f2f58/sys/dev/pci/if_iwm.c
